status_semantics.warning: Core goal succeeded with non-blocking issues.
status_semantics.failed: A required artifact, verifier check, or safety condition failed.
status_semantics.blocked: An external permission, account, platform, runtime, or device prerequisite prevented execution.

contracts.description: Checks that a requested local artifact exists and is reviewable.
pass_conditions: required artifact path exists
artifact is non-empty unless the task explicitly expects an empty file
artifact path is repo-relative in public reports

contracts.description: Checks that an edit stays inside the task's expected scope.
pass_conditions: diff is present
changed sections match the task oracle
unrelated files are not modified

contracts.description: Checks that task outcome evidence is structured, typed, and recoverable.
pass_conditions: result status is typed
blocked or failed cases have a stable failure kind
recovery suggestion is present when action is blocked or failed
public report does not expose private markers

contracts.description: Checks mobile file intake metadata and fallback behavior.
pass_conditions: incoming file path or URI is recorded
file type is detected
unsupported types produce a user-readable blocked result
public output rewrites local paths

contracts.description: Checks repository delivery evidence or typed authorization blocking.
pass_conditions: authorized runs record remote delivery evidence
unauthorized T0 runs are blocked rather than failed
remote URLs and SHAs are public-safe when reported

contracts.description: Checks that HTML artifacts can be previewed through a mobile route.
pass_conditions: artifact is HTML or has an HTML content type
preview route exists
DOM or text length exceeds the task threshold
bounded mobile viewport is not blank

contracts.description: Checks JSON parsing, repair, and top-level structure.
pass_conditions: final JSON parses
required top-level keys are present
repair action is recorded when the input was invalid

contracts.description: Checks Markdown parsing and mobile preview readiness.
pass_conditions: artifact is Markdown or text accepted as Markdown
headings or paragraphs are detected
local image references are resolvable or clearly reported missing
first screen is not empty

contracts.description: Checks public report redaction and sensitive-marker exclusion.
pass_conditions: public report contains no raw tokens
local absolute paths are absent
account identifiers are absent or explicitly approved for private evidence only

contracts.description: Checks runtime-provider selection, fallback, health, and stop behavior.
pass_conditions: selected runtime provider is recorded
runtime health or fallback reason is recorded
blocked execution remains typed
RuntimeProvider and ActionRunner boundaries are preserved

contracts.description: Checks preview snapshot metadata and non-blank visual state.
pass_conditions: snapshot metadata exists
snapshot or DOM summary indicates non-blank content when expected
blank states are reported as failed or blocked with a typed reason

contracts.description: Checks action-trace completeness and task/result alignment.
pass_conditions: trace has at least one user input
trace records at least one action and result
artifact or blocked reason is linked to the task id
summary and trace task ids match
